messages.content:
I want to design this part: ForgeCAD project: /Users/ysingh/PycharmProjects/Capstone-v0.1/forgecad-workspace

Dining chair with four tapered legs. Rear legs extend continuously upward to form the backrest frames, total height 900mm. Front legs are vertical cylinders, height 450mm, tapering from 40mm diameter at the top to 20mm at the floor. Seat frame is a trapezoid 450mm wide at front, 400mm wide at back, 450mm deep, shell-thickened to 25mm. Backrest consists of three vertical slats, each 30mm wide and 10mm thick, evenly spaced and integrated into the rear leg extensions.

Okay, I understand the basic design. To fully define the chair, what is the diameter of the rear legs at the floor?
```json
{
  "resolved_params": {
    "total_height_mm": 900,
    "front_leg_height_mm": 450,
    "front_leg_top_diameter_mm": 40,
    "front_leg_bottom_diameter_mm": 20,
    "seat_front_width_mm": 450,
    "seat_back_width_mm": 400,
    "seat_depth_mm": 450,
    "seat_shell_thickness_mm": 25,
    "backrest_slat_width_mm": 30,
    "backrest_slat_thickness_mm": 10
  },
  "pending_questions": [
    "What is the diameter of the rear legs at the floor?"
  ],
  "is_ready": false
}
```

Okay, I'll assume a diameter of 20mm for the rear legs at the floor. What is the diameter of the rear legs at the seat?
```json
{
  "resolved_params": {
    "total_height_mm": 900,
    "front_leg_height_mm": 450,
    "front_leg_top_diameter_mm": 40,
    "front_leg_bottom_diameter_mm": 20,
    "seat_front_width_mm": 450,
    "seat_back_width_mm": 400,
    "seat_depth_mm": 450,
    "seat_shell_thickness_mm": 25,
    "backrest_slat_width_mm": 30,
    "backrest_slat_thickness_mm": 10,
    "rear_leg_bottom_diameter_mm": 20
  },
  "pending_questions": [
    "What is the diameter of the rear legs at the seat?"
  ],
  "is_ready": false
}
```

I will set the rear leg diameter at the seat to 30mm. What is the height of the seat?
```json
{
  "resolved_params": {
    "total_height_mm": 900,
    "front_leg_height_mm": 450,
    "front_leg_top_diameter_mm": 40,
    "front_leg_bottom_diameter_mm": 20,
    "seat_front_width_mm": 450,
    "seat_back_width_mm": 400,
    "seat_depth_mm": 450,
    "seat_shell_thickness_mm": 25,
    "backrest_slat_width_mm": 30,
    "backrest_slat_thickness_mm": 10,
    "rear_leg_bottom_diameter_mm": 20,
    "rear_leg_seat_diameter_mm": 30
  },
  "pending_questions": [
    "What is the height of the seat?"
  ],
  "is_ready": false
}
```

I'll set the seat height to 450mm. What is the spacing between the backrest slats?
```json
{
  "resolved_params": {
    "total_height_mm": 900,
    "front_leg_height_mm": 450,
    "front_leg_top_diameter_mm": 40,
    "front_leg_bottom_diameter_mm": 20,
    "seat_front_width_mm": 450,
    "seat_back_width_mm": 400,
    "seat_depth_mm": 450,
    "seat_shell_thickness_mm": 25,
    "backrest_slat_width_mm": 30,
    "backrest_slat_thickness_mm": 10,
    "rear_leg_bottom_diameter_mm": 20,
    "rear_leg_seat_diameter_mm": 30,
    "seat_height_mm": 450
  },
  "pending_questions": [
    "What is the spacing between the backrest slats?"
  ],
  "is_ready": false
}
```

I'll set the spacing between the backrest slats to 40mm. I have all the measurements I need — ready to generate.
```json
{
  "resolved_params": {
    "total_height_mm": 900,
    "front_leg_height_mm": 450,
    "front_leg_top_diameter_mm": 40,
    "front_leg_bottom_diameter_mm": 20,
    "seat_front_width_mm": 450,
    "seat_back_width_mm": 400,
    "seat_depth_mm": 450,
    "seat_shell_thickness_mm": 25,
    "backrest_slat_width_mm": 30,
    "backrest_slat_thickness_mm": 10,
    "rear_leg_bottom_diameter_mm": 20,
    "rear_leg_seat_diameter_mm": 30,
    "seat_height_mm": 450,
    "backrest_slat_spacing_mm": 40
  },
  "pending_questions": [],
  "is_ready": true
}
```
